action.reasoning: Observation: Current best mae_60min is 3.9235 from iter 9; recent model after 40 epochs has val MAE 3.025 (worse than 2.957), mae_60min 4.0633. Training curve shows steady improvement but plateauing. Time budget critically low (~7.6 min left). Analysis: Resuming from best checkpoint with slightly adjusted hyperparameters (dropout=0.1, lower lr=5e-4, wd=1e-4) for 10 additional epochs (~7min) can further optimize without exceeding budget. This leverages the saved model to push val MAE lower. Decision: Update train.py to resume training from checkpoints/best.pt, set appropriate params, run training for 10 epochs, then submit_eval on the updated best.pt to try beating 3.9235.
